evals.prompt: I need to secure our contact form `contact-Form.form.yaml` by enabling invisible reCAPTCHA and the built-in honeypot. I want to add a reCAPTCHA element at the end of the form. Can you configure this in `packages/my-site-package/Resources/Private/Forms/contact-Form.form.yaml`?
evals.expected_output: The contact-Form.form.yaml file is updated to enable invisible recaptcha, enable honeypot, and add the Recaptcha renderable/validator.

evals.prompt: I want to add the Google reCAPTCHA v2 testing credentials to the global configuration in `settings.php` so we can test the forms locally in DDEV without getting site owner errors.
evals.expected_output: The config/system/settings.php file is updated under EXTENSIONS.recaptcha to include the official Google reCAPTCHA v2 local testing public and private keys.

evals.prompt: I want to secure our frontend user registration form. Please configure TypoScript settings for `sf-register` to use the recaptcha adapter (`Evoweb\Recaptcha\Adapter\SfRegisterAdapter`) and validate the CAPTCHA during registration. Also, show me how to render the reCAPTCHA in our Fluid registration template.
evals.expected_output: Provides the correct TypoScript settings linking evoweb/recaptcha adapter to sf-register, enabling validation on creation, and includes the Fluid markup with recaptcha namespace.
